top_signals.title: Hedge Funds Most Bearish on Yen Since 2007 on Carry Trade Bets
top_signals.summary: Hedge funds turned the most negative on the yen since 2007 as the currency trades near its weakest level in four decades, boosting the appeal of so-called carry trade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Pentagon launches ‘War Force’ campaign in push for software engineers
top_signals.summary: The Defense Department describes it as part of an overall strategy to automate and improve government technology.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fake IT support calls on Microsoft Teams push EtherRAT malware
top_signals.summary: Threat actors are abusing Microsoft Teams voice calls by impersonating corporate IT support staff to trick employees into installing the EtherRAT malware, giving attackers initial access to corporate networks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Flipper Zero firmware development continues with community help
top_signals.summary: Flipper Devices says development of the Flipper Zero firmware will continue, albeit with a smaller internal team and greater reliance on community contributions. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan’s rice prices likely to fall in coming months
top_signals.summary: An index for the outlook on rice prices over the next three months has shown stronger expectations for lower prices.
